sources.title: Cold Sweat
sources.description: Charles Bronson, Liv Ullman, James Mason, and the gorgeous Jill Ireland star in this action packed movie about a ruthless drug runner who holds a man's family hostage. A great film for Charles Bronson fans.

sources.title: Charles Bronson - Cold Sweat -1970 - They took his family, he took revenge
sources.description:
An American expatriate's (Charles Bronson) wife (Liv Ullmann) and daughter are kidnapped in France by a drug smuggler (James Mason) from his past.

⭐️ CAST:
Charles Bronson - Joe Moran / Joe Martin
Liv Ullmann - Fabienne Martin
James Mason - Captain Ross
Jill Ireland - Moira
Jean Topart - Katanga
Michel Constantin - Vermont aka Whitey (dubbed by David Hess)
Luigi Pistilli - Fausto Gelardi
Yannick De Lulle - Michèle Martin
Paul Bonifas - the doctor
Sabine Sun - the nurse
Roger Mailles - Poker Player
Nathalie Varallo - Violet
Remo Mosconi - Marius
Dominique Crosland - The Girl Scout Leader
Bob Ingarao - Fisherman

🎬 CREW CREDITS
Directed by Terence Young (Dr. No, From Russia with Love)
Written by Richard Matheson (I Am Legend novel)
Cinematography by Jean Rabier (The Umbrellas of Cherbourg)
Pulse-pounding score by Michel Magne
Action choreography by Rémy Julienne (legendary stunt coordinator)

🎯 WHY WATCH?
• Bronson at his stoic best—witness the action icon turn family protector in overdrive!
• James Mason’s chilling villainy: A masterclass in sophisticated menace.
• Riviera backdrop meets relentless thrills—sun-drenched coasts clash with explosive boat chases!

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics

• Action • Crime • Thriller • 70s Gem • Euro-Cult • Suspense

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=UUMOycDFnpMeWzaITQSD1dWsOA

metadata.Plot: Joe Martin, a quiet American, lives a quiet life in the South of France renting boats to tourists. He is happily married to Fabienne and has a twelve-year-old daughter named Michèle. But the quiet man has a past: ten years before, Joe (then Moran) had escaped with four other convicts, among whom the sadistic ex-mercenary Katanga. Seeing the latter brutally kill an M. P., Joe had abandoned his accomplices and left with the car. One night, Captain Ross, Katanga, Whitey and Fausto re-appear..
metadata.Writer: Richard Matheson, Shimon Wincelberg, Albert Simonin
metadata.Actors: Charles Bronson, James Mason, Liv Ullmann
